search_queries_used: site:doh.gov.ae preventive lifestyle counselling guideline UAE
site:nice.org.uk/guidance/ng246 diet activity goals barriers follow-up
candidate_sources_rejected: condition-specific advice treated as universal prevention guidance
rejection_reasons: Generic and commercial pages were not accepted as authoritative clinical sources.
Patient checklists do not support clinician documentation.
Condition-specific recommendations cannot be applied automatically to a broad lifestyle workflow.
population_applicability: Limited: the exact source addresses weight-management contexts rather than every general lifestyle-review presentation.
setting_applicability: Partial for documented diet, activity, measured weight or BMI, goals, barriers, and clinician-arranged support; broad preventive counselling remains unsupported.
UAE_applicability: No exact UAE broad lifestyle-review guideline was identified. NICE content requires UAE clinician review and weight-related context.
recency_verification: Current NICE NG246, last updated 2026-01-08, was reviewed on 2026-07-13.
superseded_check: NICE NG246 is current; no newer superseding NICE weight-management guideline was identified.

evidence_items.direct_relationship: Supports measured weight and BMI documentation in a permission-sensitive weight context only.
evidence_items.paraphrased_evidence_summary: Supports avoiding diagnostic overshadowing, asking permission before weight discussion or measurements, and recording height, weight, BMI, waist or waist-to-height context and weight-related health risk.

evidence_items.direct_relationship: Supports diet, activity, goals, barriers, and clinician-agreed lifestyle documentation in weight-management context.
evidence_items.paraphrased_evidence_summary: Supports comorbidity, social or mental-health context, diet or activity goals, previous attempts, experiences, barriers, preferences, clinician-agreed intervention, and preference-sensitive referral documentation.

evidence_items.direct_relationship: Supports progress and clinician-arranged follow-up without a fixed interval.
evidence_items.paraphrased_evidence_summary: Supports documenting personalised goals, progress, barriers, support, and clinician-arranged review without inserting automatic lifestyle instructions.

unresolved_source_gaps: Broad lifestyle-review identity and aliases, sleep, stress, alcohol, chest pain, breathlessness, fever, weight loss, blood pressure, general appearance, questions, fixed review timing, and the combined history draft remain unsupported.
Diet, exercise, sleep, alcohol, goals, and follow-up must be clinician-documented and not generated as advice.
Qualified UAE clinician review has not been completed.
